stat_definition: STS2.fun Necrobinder card table with Viewing Patch = All Patches, rarity/type = All, Separate upgrades off, Min. 5 offers on. pick_rate is Reward %, sample_size is Offered, win_rate is Win %, impact is Impact.
reviewer_notes: Captured manually from the STS2.fun Necrobinder card table. STS2.fun does not provide card-specific URLs. Unleash and Bodyguard omitted because they are starter/base cards with no normal reward pick stats.
